/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/cjpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/cdjpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdbmp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdgif.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdpng-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdpng-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdpng-16.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdppm-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdppm-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdppm-16.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdswitch.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdtarga.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/adler32.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/compress.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/crc32.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/deflate.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/inffast.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/inflate.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/inftrees.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/trees.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/zutil.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/spng-static.dir/spng.c.o" -o cjpeg-static  libjpeg.a
